## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run check` passes locally
- [ ] Integration recipes (if touched) match the current **official** documentation, and `officialSource.lastVerifiedAt` was updated
- [ ] No silent file/script overwrites were introduced
- [ ] Tests were added or updated for behavior changes
- [ ] Documentation (README/CHANGELOG) was updated if user-facing behavior changed
